name: disaster_response_defense_subcontractor_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A Disaster Response response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving disaster response defense subcontractor lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Marco Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Marco Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Disaster Response when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Leila Silva
agents.identity: I am Leila Silva, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Disaster Response.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Marco Vasquez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Vasquez do?
